  "findings": [
    "Sheave misalignment detected using straightedge"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Loosen the sheave mounting bolts, adjust the axial position or angular alignment of the sheaves until the straightedge contacts all four reference points on the sheave faces, and torque to manufacturer specifications."
  ],
  "rationale": "The straightedge inspection reveals sheave misalignment, which is an installed-defective condition. Operating the asset with misaligned sheaves will cause rapid belt wear, vibration, and premature bearing failure. The alignment must be corrected using the manufacturer's adjustment procedures before the asset is returned to service.",
